'''pagotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabal|sabal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabal|sabal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pagotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægetheth|pægetheth]] || [[word:pægethej|pægethej]] || [[word:pægethesh|pægethesh]] || [[word:pægethe|pægethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagogothoth|pagogothoth]] || [[word:pagogothoj|pagogothoj]] || [[word:pagogothosh|pagogothosh]] || [[word:pagogotho|pagogotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagothoth|pagothoth]] || [[word:pagothoj|pagothoj]] || [[word:pagothosh|pagothosh]] || [[word:pagotho|pagotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagofthoth|pagofthoth]] || [[word:pagofthoj|pagofthoj]] || [[word:pagofthosh|pagofthosh]] || [[word:pagofthof|pagofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagothotho|pagothotho]] || [[word:pagothojo|pagothojo]] || [[word:pagothosho|pagothosho]] || [[word:pagothoko|pagothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagothoth|pagothoth]] || [[word:pagothoj|pagothoj]] || [[word:pagothosh|pagothosh]] || [[word:pagotho|pagotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagothothol|pagothothol]] || [[word:pagothojol|pagothojol]] || [[word:pagothoshol|pagothoshol]] || [[word:pagothokol|pagothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagothothotho|pagothothotho]] || [[word:pagothojojo|pagothojojo]] || [[word:pagothoshosho|pagothoshosho]] || [[word:pagothoko|pagothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagothothon|pagothothon]] || [[word:pagothojon|pagothojon]] || [[word:pagothoshon|pagothoshon]] || [[word:pagothokon|pagothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagothothoro|pagothothoro]] || [[word:pagothojoro|pagothojoro]] || [[word:pagothoshoro|pagothoshoro]] || [[word:pagothokoro|pagothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
